description: May visits the hotel Talbot specified and quickly uncovers a HYDRA plot. She is ambushed by Sunil Bakshi and a brainwashed agent. May fights fiercely but is subdued and replaced by a doppelganger using a special mask. Bakshi hatches a plan to have the false May infiltrate Coulson’s team, heightening the stakes.

transcript.line: What have you done with Talbot?
